summary: Muffled matrix recording of a modest show, highlighted by a smoking The Other One > MLB jam.
review: The concert delivers solid energy and smooth segues, with the extended Other One > MLB sequence earning particular praise. However, the matrix source sounds cramped—often described as being recorded in a closet—which detracts from the listening experience. Overall the performance is decent but the audio quality keeps it from being a standout release.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is moderate (energy, good segues, notable Other One > MLB) while recording quality is consistently described as muffled/closet‑like, leading to a weighted average around the high‑mid 3s.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio sounds cramped and muffled, likened to playing under a pillow or in a closet; some listeners note it settles after repeated listening but overall lacks clarity.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance is energetic with good segues, though the set as a whole is considered unremarkable rather than spectacular.
